| AC5 | 2 | Missing (fails), `false` provided (passes) |
| AC6 | 2 | `true` provided (fails), `false` provided (also fails) |
| AC7 | 2 | 2-error combo, 3-error combo |

The only action needed is **running `npm test`** to confirm all 15 pass. Approve to proceed.
